$schema: Ukraine v Russia international cases dataset, compiled 2026-04-27

meta.scope: International and domestic legal proceedings between Ukrainian and Russian parties (state, SOEs, private), 2014-2026

forums.ICJ: International Court of Justice, The Hague
forums.ECtHR: European Court of Human Rights, Strasbourg
forums.ITLOS: International Tribunal for the Law of the Sea, Hamburg
forums.PCA: Permanent Court of Arbitration, The Hague
forums.DUTCH: Dutch courts (District Court of The Hague, Court of Appeal, Hoge Raad)

cases.name: Ukraine v Russia (CERD + Terrorism Financing)
cases.subject: Russia's support to armed groups in eastern Ukraine (ICSFT) and racial discrimination against Crimean Tatars/Ukrainians in Crimea (CERD)

milestones.event: Judgment on preliminary objections - jurisdiction confirmed

cases.outcome: Russia found in violation of ICSFT Art. 9(1), CERD Art. 2(1)(a) and 5(e)(v); most claims rejected; no compensation

cases.name: Allegations of Genocide (Ukraine v Russia, 32 intervening states)
cases.subject: Ukraine seeks declaration it has not committed genocide and that Russia's invasion violates Genocide Convention

milestones.event: Provisional measures (13-2): Russia must suspend military operations

cases.outcome: Provisional measures ignored by Russia; merits ongoing

cases.name: Russia v Australia and Netherlands (ICAO Council appeal)
cases.subject: Russia's Article 84 appeal against ICAO MH17 Council decision

cases.name: Ukraine v Russia (re Crimea) [GC]
cases.subject: Administrative practice of HR violations in Crimea since Feb 2014 (occupation, repression of Tatars/activists, language restrictions)

milestones.event: GC admissibility - Russia exercises jurisdiction in Crimea from 27 Feb 2014
GC merits judgment - violations of Arts 2, 3, 5, 6, 8-11, 14, 18, P1-1, P1-2, P4-2

cases.outcome: Russia found in unanimous violation across multiple ECHR articles

cases.name: Ukraine and the Netherlands v Russia [GC] (eastern Ukraine + MH17 + post-2022)
cases.subject: Administrative practice in eastern Ukraine, MH17 downing, child abductions, full-scale invasion violations

milestones.event: Interim measures - Russia not to attack civilians
GC merits judgment - Russia liable incl. for downing of MH17

cases.outcome: Russia liable; just-satisfaction phase pending for MH17 application 28525/20

cases.name: Ukraine v Russia (VIII) - Kerch Strait
cases.subject: Russian seizure of 3 Ukrainian naval vessels and 24 servicemen in Kerch Strait, 25 Nov 2018

cases.name: Ukraine v Russia (IX) - transnational repression
cases.subject: Targeted killings/assassination attempts by Russian state agents abroad against perceived opponents

cases.name: Russia v Ukraine
cases.subject: Russia's allegations of HR violations by Ukraine (incl. MH17 alleging Ukrainian airspace responsibility, Crimea canal cutoff)

cases.name: Situation in Ukraine
cases.subject: War crimes, crimes against humanity, potentially genocide on Ukrainian territory from 21 Nov 2013

cases.name: Prosecutor v Putin
cases.subject: War crimes of unlawful deportation/transfer of Ukrainian children

cases.name: Prosecutor v Lvova-Belova
cases.subject: War crimes of unlawful deportation/transfer of Ukrainian children

cases.name: Prosecutor v Kobylash
cases.subject: Missile strikes on Ukrainian energy infrastructure Oct 2022 - March 2023

cases.name: Prosecutor v Sokolov
cases.subject: Attacks on Ukrainian energy infrastructure

cases.name: Prosecutor v Shoigu
cases.subject: Russian missile-strike campaign vs Ukrainian energy infrastructure

cases.name: Prosecutor v Gerasimov
cases.subject: Russian missile-strike campaign vs Ukrainian energy infrastructure

cases.name: Detention of Ukrainian Naval Vessels (Provisional Measures) + PCA Annex VII
cases.subject: Russian seizure of Berdyansk, Nikopol, Yani Kapu and 24 servicemen near Kerch Strait

milestones.event: ITLOS provisional measures - Russia must release
PCA Annex VII Award on Preliminary Objections

cases.outcome: Provisional measures complied; merits before Annex VII tribunal

cases.name: Australia and Netherlands v Russia (MH17, Article 84)
cases.subject: Russia's responsibility for MH17 downing under Chicago Convention Art. 3 bis
cases.outcome: Russia found in breach; remedies stage and ICJ appeal pending

cases.name: Naftogaz v Gazprom - Gas Supply (SCC)
cases.subject: Gas supply contract dispute (Swedish law)
cases.outcome: Naftogaz to pay Gazprom ~USD 2.02bn; netted against transit award; settled 2019

cases.name: Naftogaz v Gazprom - Gas Transit (SCC)
cases.subject: Gas transit contract - minimum-volume breach
cases.outcome: Gazprom to pay USD 4.63bn; net USD 2.56bn after offset; ~USD 2.1bn paid pre-settlement

cases.name: Naftogaz v Gazprom (III) - ICC Transit (post-2022)
cases.subject: Sokhranivka force-majeure transit dispute under 2019 Transit Contract

milestones.event: Swiss Federal Tribunal rejects Gazprom set-aside

cases.name: Naftogaz et al. v Russia (Crimea expropriation)
cases.subject: Expropriation of Crimean oil & gas assets (upstream, midstream, distribution, stored gas) under Russia-Ukraine BIT 1998

milestones.event: Hague Court of Appeal dismisses Russia's challenge
Vienna District Court exequatur + 20 properties seized

cases.name: Aeroport Belbek + Kolomoisky v Russia
cases.subject: Belbek Airport (Sevastopol) - occupation Feb 2014, nationalization June 2014

milestones.event: Hague Court of Appeal dismisses set-aside

cases.name: PrivatBank + Finilon v Russia
cases.subject: Crimea banking operations, real estate, ATM network (~USD 1bn claimed)

cases.name: Oschadbank v Russia
cases.subject: Crimean banking branch, expropriated assets

milestones.event: Paris CoA on renvoi confirms award

cases.outcome: Final; ~USD 99m of Russian assets seized in France

cases.name: Ukrnafta v Russia
cases.subject: 16 petrol stations and offices in Crimea

milestones.event: Swiss FT 4A_396/2017 - confirms BIT applies in Crimea

cases.name: Stabil et al. v Russia
cases.subject: 31 petrol stations in Crimea (11 Kolomoisky-affiliated companies)
cases.outcome: Final and binding; US confirmation petition filed 2022

cases.name: Everest Estate et al. v Russia
cases.subject: Real estate (hotels, apartments, commercial property) in Crimea - Everest + 18 companies

milestones.event: First-ever BIT decision finding protection in occupied territory
Award on Merits & Quantum - USD 130m principal (~USD 159m with costs)
Hoge Raad REMANDS to Amsterdam CoA on limited evidentiary issues

cases.outcome: Liability/quantum awarded; set-aside remand pending - only Crimea case to be remanded

cases.name: Lugzor et al. v Russia
cases.subject: Real estate investments in Crimea (5 claimants incl. DniproAzot)

cases.name: DTEK Krymenergo v Russia
cases.subject: Crimean electricity grid distributor (Akhmetov / DTEK Energy B.V.)

milestones.event: UK High Court [2025] EWHC 1060 stays enforcement pending Dutch annulment

cases.outcome: Award rendered; UK enforcement stayed; Dutch set-aside ongoing

cases.name: NEK Ukrenergo v Russia
cases.subject: 17+ HV substations and 1,300+ km transmission lines seized in Crimea

milestones.event: Award on Jurisdiction - tribunal rejects cross-border requirement

cases.name: Energoatom v Russia (II) - Zaporizhzhia NPP
cases.subject: Zaporizhzhia NPP and other assets in occupied Zaporizhzhia oblast (USD 3bn claimed)

cases.name: Ukrhydroenergo v Russia - Kakhovka HPP
cases.subject: Destruction of Kakhovka HPP dam (June 2023) + 140 missile attacks (USD 2.5bn claimed)
cases.outcome: Paused pending coordination with Ukrainian government

cases.name: Public Prosecution Service v Girkin, Dubinskiy, Pulatov, Kharchenko
cases.subject: Causing crash of MH17 and murder of 298 with Buk missile from Pervomaiskyi

milestones.event: OM declines to appeal Pulatov acquittal

cases.outcome: Three convicted in absentia (life imprisonment); civil damages ~EUR 16m

cases.name: JIT MH17 follow-on investigation
cases.subject: Identification of additional suspects in MH17 chain of command

milestones.event: JIT suspends - leads exhausted; identified Putin's active role but no immunity waiver

cases.name: Russia v Naftogaz et al. (set-aside cassation)
cases.subject: Russia's set-aside of PCA Naftogaz Crimea award

cases.name: Russia v Belbek/Kolomoisky (set-aside cassation)
cases.subject: Russia's set-aside of Belbek partial awards

cases.name: Russia v PrivatBank/Finilon (set-aside cassation)
cases.subject: Russia's set-aside of PrivatBank partial awards

cases.name: Russia v Everest Estate (set-aside cassation)
cases.subject: Russia's set-aside + revocation (alleged fraud) of Everest award

milestones.event: Hoge Raad REMANDS to Amsterdam CoA

cases.outcome: Remand on narrow evidentiary/admissibility issues - only Crimea case remanded

cases.name: Finland v Yan Petrovsky (Voislav Torden)
cases.subject: 4 war crimes in Luhansk Sept 2014 - killing 22 Ukrainian soldiers; Rusich mercenary group deputy commander

milestones.event: Conviction - life sentence (first universal-jurisdiction conviction worldwide of mercenary-group member for Ukraine war crimes)

cases.name: Lithuania v Margen Gadzhimagomedov
cases.subject: War crimes vs civilians/POWs in Melitopol filtration camp Mar-Sep 2022 (incl. Lithuanian victim)

milestones.event: Suspect transferred from Ukrainian custody (first such extradition)

cases.name: Germany v Vardges I., Robert A., Arman S. (espionage trial)
cases.subject: Intelligence activities for Russian service - surveilling former Ukrainian-army serviceman in Frankfurt for possible assassination plot

cases.name: UniCredit v RusChemAlliance
cases.subject: UniCredit performance bonds for Russian LNG facility (~EUR 10bn); permanent anti-suit injunction restraining Russian-court proceedings

milestones.event: UK Supreme Court reasoned judgment - anti-suit upheld

cases.name: EU/Belgium - Russian Central Bank asset immobilisation at Euroclear
cases.subject: ~EUR 210bn Russian CBR assets at Euroclear; reparations loan negotiation

milestones.event: EU agrees indefinite freeze; Russian CBR countersuit RUB 18.2tn
